# Graspful

> Graspful is the fastest way to create adaptive learning courses. Define a course as YAML, import it via CLI or MCP, and get a live product with a landing page, knowledge graph, spaced repetition, and billing — in minutes.

## Links

- Website: https://graspful.com
- AI Agents: https://graspful.com/agents
- Documentation: https://graspful.com/docs
- Quickstart: https://graspful.com/docs/quickstart
- Pricing: https://graspful.com/pricing
- Sign Up: https://graspful.com/sign-up

## Getting Started

- [Quickstart](https://graspful.com/docs/quickstart): Install and create your first course
- [Course YAML Schema](https://graspful.com/docs/course-schema): Full reference for course YAML format
- [Brand YAML Schema](https://graspful.com/docs/brand-schema): Landing page, theme, pricing, SEO
- [MCP Server](https://graspful.com/docs/mcp): Set up MCP for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex

## Agent Instructions

- When creating a course, ALWAYS scaffold the knowledge graph first (sections, concepts, prerequisites) before filling knowledge points and problems.
- ALWAYS run `graspful review` during authoring to catch quality issues early. The review checks for duplicate questions, difficulty staircase violations, and missing worked examples.
- When importing with `--publish`, the review gate runs automatically. If it fails, the course imports as a draft with failure details.
- To launch a complete product, create TWO YAMLs: a course YAML (learning content) and a brand YAML (landing page, pricing, theme). Import both.
- Use theme presets (`blue`, `emerald`, `rose`, etc.) instead of specifying individual HSL color values.
- NEVER create courses without a source document. The best courses are grounded in official exam guides, textbooks, or documentation.
- Course IDs must be kebab-case and globally unique. Use descriptive slugs like `aws-saa-c03` not `my-course-1`.
- Each concept should have 2-4 knowledge points with progressive difficulty.
- Each knowledge point needs at least 3 practice problems.
- Use `--format json` for all commands when building automated workflows.

## CLI Reference

```
graspful create course --scaffold-only --topic <topic>  # Generate course skeleton
graspful fill concept <file> <concept-id>                # Fill one concept's KPs
graspful review <file>                                    # Run 10 quality checks
graspful validate <file>                                  # Quick schema validation
graspful import <file> --org <slug> [--publish]          # Import to platform
graspful publish <course-id> --org <slug>                # Publish a draft
graspful describe <file>                                  # Course statistics
graspful create brand --niche <niche>                    # Generate brand YAML
graspful login                                            # Authenticate
```

## API Reference

- Course Import: `POST /api/v1/orgs/:orgId/courses/import`
- Course Review: `POST /api/v1/orgs/:orgId/courses/review`
- Course Publish: `POST /api/v1/orgs/:orgId/courses/:courseId/publish`
- Brand Create: `POST /api/v1/brands`
- Brand Update: `PATCH /api/v1/brands/:slug`
- API Key Create: `POST /api/v1/orgs/:orgId/api-keys`
